name: What's my case worth if ladder fall caused surgery?

mainEntity.name: What's my case worth if ladder fall caused surgery?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**$100K-$500K+ with surgery, depending on recovery and job.**

Factors: bills, scarring, lost income, permanency.

- Surgery boosts value.
- Future care included.
- UT/ ID schedules apply.[5]

Attorney calculates accurately; settle wisely.
